title: payee silently stores 0 zatoshi on malformed payer amount
description: dispatch_payment uses parse_zec_to_zatoshi(&amount).unwrap_or(0) when creating the payee session. If the payer sends a malformed or out-of-range amount string, the payee session is created with amount_zatoshi=0 and the auto-response address is sent anyway. The payee UI shows a payment address but the stored amount is wrong. Trigger: payer sends PaymentAction::Request{amount:'bad'} (e.g., a future bug or version mismatch). Bad behavior: payee creates a Payee session recording the wrong amount, responds with STUB address, user has no indication anything went wrong.
